name: Feta and Greek Yogurt Pita Appetizer
method: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
Stir the feta with the yogurt in a medium bowl until smooth.
Mix in the mint and olive oil thoroughly.
Around each pita, distribute the yogurt-feta mixture.
Bake for about ten minutes, just until the tops of the pita begin to
Remove the pitas and cut them into 6 or 8 pieces with a pizza cutter
